title: Benchmark manifest
description: Manifest describing a single benchmark in the ai-bench suite. Frozen by chunk C02 for v1 chunks C01-C12; post-v1 schema evolution is owned by C13 via a versioned migration plan, not by in-flight edits to this file.

schema_version.description: Schema version this manifest conforms to. v1 uses '1'.

id.description: Stable, unique benchmark identifier (slug). Used by discovery, the registry, and run-records.

description.description: Short description of what the benchmark measures.

task_type.description: Task type selecting the runner adapter and verifier path.

verifier.description: Built-in verifier name. v1 supports exact_match, contains_any, regex_match, set_f1, state_check, llm_judge.

params.description: Verifier parameters (e.g. case sensitivity, expected set). Free-form per verifier; validated by the scorer.

version.description: Benchmark manifest/fixture version (semver-ish). Bumped when cases or expected values change.

contact.description: Optional contact handle (email, handle, or URL).

case_glob.description: Glob (relative to the benchmark directory) selecting case files. Resolved safely by the loader; cannot escape the benchmark directory.

tags.description: Benchmark-level tags. Free-form strings; the case-level 'smoke' tag is reserved for case files.

status.description: Maturity status. Defaults to 'experimental' when omitted.

prompt_template.description: Optional pinned prompt template for reproducibility.

sampling.description: Default sampling parameters for the benchmark; overridable per run.

llm_judge.description: Pinned LLM-judge configuration required when the benchmark metric verifier is llm_judge and no per-case llm_judge override is provided. The judge model, prompt, params, and seed must be pinned for reproducibility.

allOf.description: An llm_judge benchmark metric must pin judge metadata at the benchmark level so it cannot validate without a reproducible judge configuration.
